creator: milios@ccsys.com
text:
i still experience this problem on my system (11.0-RELEASE-p8/amd64), again during the last update of the litecoin ports, and ive since found, additionally with the lang/phantomjs port. in all cases deleting leveldb from the build system allowed the build to succeed and the software packages then ran fine after the leveldb package was re-added to the system.

i'll try in the next couple weeks to reduce my setup down and see if i can't figure out why i'm so special.

for now, oh well. if someone else finds this problem there is this workaround. otherwise i'll just accept that i'm crazy and alone. LOL

BTW, i'm not using poudriere just /usr/ports from svn and `make`
